title: 高松宮記念の後に・バクシン出直し

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Gnaaah! I was not able to obtain a perfect
victory...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower is still just too fast! It's frustrating!
choice_data_list: Looks like you're still lacking in speed.
Looks like you're still lacking in speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're right...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, that is not to say this isn't a good
result!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I say this result is good enough to bring my sprint
training to a clos—
choice_data_list:
Let's keep going until you can beat her by
1,000 lengths!

Let's keep going until you can beat her by
1,000 lengths!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!
choice_data_list: We're going to keep improving your speed!
We're going to keep improving your speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I know I need to do that, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Um, I do have a question for you. It just, well,
popped in my head right about now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I don't suppose you're deceiving me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Did you twitch just now?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yet this is our third year together, and I still
haven't done any long-distance training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I support your reasoning on wanting to
perfect my speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, as of late, I am beginning to have my
doubts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training for speed will bring us closer to her
dream. I trust that she wants that more than
anyone. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I can't convince her now, she could end up
hurting herself in a race she can't handle yet.
That's why I'll say...
choice_data_list: Let's try for a long-distance race!
Let's try for a long-distance race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Whoooa?! Does... does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is it finally my time to sweep the Twin Tenno Sho
and take on the Arima Kinen?!
choice_data_list: First up is the G3 Hakodate Sprint Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!
choice_data_list: Then it's the G3 CBC Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh!
choice_data_list: Lastly, we'll go for the G2 Centaur Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Aren't all of those races 1,200 meters?! None of
them are even close to being long distance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I knew it, Trainer, you are deceiving me—
choice_data_list: Not quite. You'll be competing in three races.
Not quite. You'll be competing in three races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...So? What does that change?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You don't mean!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...That's the same distance as the Stayers Stakes,
the longest race in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So... if you add a bunch of 1,200-meter races
together, it becomes a long-distance race?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And if I place first in all of them... that'll mean I've
won a 3,600-meter race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely run my heart out! Your words are so
profound!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could put my trust in you! I apologize for
doubting you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will run all three races! Long distance, short
distance, I'll Bakushin right through them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And that's how we decide our next race will be
the Hakodate Sprint S!
